falsification_conditions.condition: Price rises above 10% from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant upward move would contradict the pattern of a potential bottom, invalidating the HOLD signal.
An extreme blowoff score would indicate a market climax, not a bottom formation, directly refuting the current pattern match.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern match similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 50%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A substantial decline in pattern similarity would mean the current market dynamics no longer align with the historical bottom scenario.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
